text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I accompany Nishino Flower to watch
a flower she's been caring for bloom. Apparently,
it only blooms at night.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm... It should bloom any moment now...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I usually go to bed at this time, so I'm a bit
sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to do my best to stay up tonight! I
want to be here when this flower blooms!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Plus... I have a strong feeling it'll bloom tonight.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. If you feel the same, then I'm sure it'll—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's eyes widen as she looks at the
bud, which starts to quiver. This is a clear sign
that it's about to bloom!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Keep going! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I hold our breaths and watch
until finally...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The large flower unfurls its petals under the stars,
and a soft fragrance fills the air.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flower gleams as if it's infused with
moonlight. For a while, we simply stare at the
bloom in awed silence...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you for being here with me today, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we got to see the flower bloom
together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...One day, I want to blossom just like this flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to shine bright for everyone to see!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's work toward our goal—together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer... Good night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the sight of the glowing flower will
become an unforgettable memory for both
Nishino Flower and me.
